# Contributing

The repository holds digital assets associated with static artwork.
Contributions enhancing repository quality are welcome. Artwork changes,
however, are inappropriate.

Contributors should follow a standard [fork and pull request workflow](https://www.google.com/search?q=GitHub+fork+and+pull+request+workflow).

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Pull requests are only being accepted from formal collaborators.

## Welcome Contributions

- Bug reports.
- Documentation suggestions.

## Unwelcome Contributions

- Artwork changes.

## Issues

To report a bug, please open an associated issue. The issue should contain:

- A minimal working example, demonstrating the bug.
- A description of the operating environment the bug occurs in.

Documentation suggestions may also be made by opening an issue.

## Pull Requests

Pull requests should contain:

- A change description and motivation.
- References to any associated issues.

## Time Management

Please be wary of devoting much time to repository contributions. Though
contributions are welcome, the repository owner reserves the right to reject
contributions.
